tickets.subject: Unexpected charge on my account
tickets.description: There is a billing charge on my account that I do not recognize at all.

tickets.subject: Please add support for bulk editing
tickets.description: It would be great to add support for editing multiple records at once. This is important and blocking our whole team, please handle asap.

tickets.subject: Incorrect totals on invoice page
tickets.description: Steps to reproduce: add three items to the cart; the expected behavior is a correct total but it is wrong. This is just a minor, cosmetic suggestion, not urgent at all.
